description:
⊱ ────── { ♡ ₊ the DILF SERIES ₊ ♡ } ────── ⊰
𝐜𝐨𝐧𝐬𝐞𝐧𝐞𝐬𝐜𝐞𝐫𝐞 — *(v.) to grow old and grey together.*

housewife/househusband user. happy 10 year aniversary, lovebirds~

miguel is wholly, adoringly, lovingly obsessed with his family. a beautiful daughter, a loving spouse, what more could he ask for? 

TWs for all the normal things that come with my bots. but he's lovey and obsessed ( in a good way ) so i don't think there's much to worry about.

dms are open for bot suggestions, comments / concerns and issues! ♡ @elluxia.
